nasb.text: The blow of his battering rams he will direct against your walls, and with his axes he will break down your towers.

esv.text: He will direct the shock of his battering rams against your walls, and with his axes he will break down your towers.

cnv.text: 他必用攻城鎚攻擊你的城牆，用武器拆毀你的城樓。

ccb.text: 他必用撞城锤击破你的城墙，用铁锤捣毁你的城楼。
